title: taraxacum iliense
intro: Taraxacum iliense is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to the mountainous regions of the Ili River in Kyrgyzstan. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum iliense include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
